sub_groupings.name: Malnutrition Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions characterized by inadequate or excessive nutrient intake leading to health issues

sub_groupings.name: Nutritional Assessment Findings
sub_groupings.description: Objective measurements or observations related to dietary intake and consumption patterns

sub_groupings.name: Eating and Drinking Behaviors
sub_groupings.description: Abnormal patterns or difficulties related to food and fluid consumption

sub_groupings.name: Nutritional Deficiency Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions caused by specific nutrient deficiencies or metabolic imbalances

sub_groupings.name: Gastrointestinal Nutritional Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Nutritional issues related to gastrointestinal function and absorption

sub_groupings.name: Other Nutritional Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Miscellaneous nutritional conditions that don't fit other categories
